homepage.heroSubline: Crafting exceptional outdoor living spaces. Built to last, designed for life in Tulsa.
aboutText: Fincannon Outdoor Living started with a simple goal: to build the best decks in Tulsa. We're not just contractors; we're your neighbors, committed to enhancing our community one project at a time.

Our approach is straightforward: honest communication, meticulous craftsmanship, and unwavering commitment to quality. We treat every project as if it were our own backyard, ensuring every detail is perfect.
From Brookside bungalows to suburban estates, we understand Tulsa's unique architectural landscape. We're proud to contribute to the beauty and functionality of our city's outdoor spaces.

valueProps.title: Expert Craftsmanship
valueProps.description: Decades of experience building decks designed to withstand Tulsa's climate.

valueProps.title: Custom Design
valueProps.description: We tailor every deck to your specific needs and style, maximizing your outdoor living space.

valueProps.title: Premium Materials
valueProps.description: Using only the highest quality lumber and composite decking for lasting durability.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: Deep understanding of Tulsa's building codes and neighborhood aesthetics.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free quote and start planning your dream deck today.

services.name: Custom Deck Design
services.shortDescription: Personalized deck design services to bring your vision to life.
services.description: Your deck should be an extension of your home and a reflection of your personal style. Our custom deck design services start with a thorough consultation to understand your needs, preferences, and budget. We consider everything from the size and shape of your yard to the architectural style of your home. We then create detailed 3D renderings, allowing you to visualize your new deck before construction begins. We guide you through material selection, railing options, and lighting choices to ensure every detail is perfect. Our goal is to create a deck that is not only beautiful but also functional and durable, providing years of enjoyment for you and your family. We factor in Tulsa's hot summers and occasional ice storms to ensure structural integrity and weather resistance. We obtain all necessary permits and ensure compliance with local building codes. Whether you envision a sprawling multi-level deck or a cozy backyard retreat, we have the expertise to make your dream a reality.
process: Step 1: Initial Consultation and Site Assessment
Step 2: Design Development and 3D Renderings
Step 3: Material Selection and Budget Refinement
Step 4: Permitting and Construction Planning
benefits: Personalized design tailored to your needs
Enhanced outdoor living space
Increased property value
Expert guidance throughout the design process

faq.question: How long does the design process take?
faq.answer: The design process typically takes 2-4 weeks, depending on the complexity of the project and the number of revisions required.

faq.question: What is included in the design fee?
faq.answer: The design fee includes the initial consultation, site assessment, 3D renderings, material selection assistance, and permit acquisition.

faq.question: Can you incorporate existing features into the design?
faq.answer: Yes, we can incorporate existing features such as trees, patios, and pools into the deck design to create a seamless and integrated outdoor living space.

services.name: Deck Construction
services.shortDescription: Professional deck construction services using premium materials and expert craftsmanship.
services.description: Our deck construction services are built on a foundation of quality and precision. We use only the finest materials, from pressure-treated lumber to composite decking, to ensure your deck is built to last. Our experienced carpenters are meticulous in their work, paying close attention to every detail, from the foundation to the finishing touches. We adhere to strict building codes and safety standards, ensuring your deck is structurally sound and safe for your family and friends. We understand Tulsa's unique climate and build decks that can withstand the elements, from scorching summers to icy winters. We manage every aspect of the construction process, from site preparation to final inspection, ensuring a seamless and stress-free experience for you. Our commitment to quality extends beyond the construction phase; we offer ongoing maintenance and repair services to keep your deck in top condition for years to come. We work efficiently and respectfully, minimizing disruption to your daily life. Whether you're building a new deck or replacing an existing one, you can trust Fincannon Outdoor Living to deliver exceptional results.
process: Step 1: Site Preparation and Foundation Laying
Step 2: Framing and Structural Construction
Step 3: Decking Installation and Railing Construction
Step 4: Finishing Touches and Final Inspection
benefits: Durable and long-lasting construction
Expert craftsmanship and attention to detail
Compliance with building codes and safety standards
Stress-free construction process

faq.question: How long does deck construction typically take?
faq.answer: Deck construction typically takes 1-3 weeks, depending on the size and complexity of the project.

faq.question: What types of materials do you use for deck construction?
faq.answer: We use a variety of materials, including pressure-treated lumber, cedar, redwood, and composite decking. We can help you choose the material that best suits your needs and budget.

faq.question: Do you offer warranties on your deck construction services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer warranties on our deck construction services. The length of the warranty varies depending on the materials used and the scope of the project.

services.name: Deck Repair
services.shortDescription: Reliable deck repair services to restore the safety and beauty of your outdoor space.
services.description: Is your deck showing signs of wear and tear? Don't wait until minor issues become major problems. Our deck repair services are designed to restore the safety and beauty of your outdoor space. We handle a wide range of repairs, from replacing damaged boards to reinforcing structural supports. We understand the unique challenges that Tulsa's climate poses to decks, such as wood rot, insect damage, and weather-related wear. Our experienced technicians will thoroughly inspect your deck to identify any issues and provide you with a detailed repair plan. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure lasting repairs. We also offer preventative maintenance services to help you avoid future problems. Whether you need a simple railing repair or a complete deck overhaul, we have the expertise to get the job done right. We prioritize safety and ensure that all repairs are up to code. We work efficiently and respectfully, minimizing disruption to your daily life. Protect your investment and ensure the safety of your family with our reliable deck repair services.
process: Step 1: Thorough Deck Inspection and Damage Assessment
Step 2: Development of a Customized Repair Plan
Step 3: Execution of Repairs with Quality Materials
Step 4: Final Inspection and Safety Check
benefits: Restored safety and stability of your deck
Extended lifespan of your deck
Improved aesthetic appeal of your outdoor space
Prevention of further damage and costly repairs

faq.question: How do I know if my deck needs repair?
faq.answer: Signs that your deck needs repair include loose or wobbly railings, cracked or rotting boards, sagging or uneven surfaces, and visible signs of insect damage.

faq.question: How much does deck repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of deck repair varies depending on the extent of the damage and the materials required. We offer free estimates to assess the damage and provide you with a detailed quote.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency deck repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer emergency deck repair services for urgent situations, such as structural damage that poses a safety hazard.

services.name: Deck Staining & Sealing
services.shortDescription: Protect and beautify your deck with our professional staining and sealing services.
services.description: Tulsa's weather can be tough on decks. Our staining and sealing services protect your deck from the elements and enhance its natural beauty. We use high-quality stains and sealants that are specifically designed to withstand the harsh sun, rain, and temperature fluctuations of Oklahoma. Our experienced technicians will properly prepare your deck surface by cleaning and sanding it to ensure optimal adhesion of the stain or sealant. We offer a wide range of colors and finishes to complement your home's exterior. Our staining and sealing services not only protect your deck from moisture, UV damage, and mildew but also enhance its aesthetic appeal. We apply multiple coats for maximum protection and durability. We also offer ongoing maintenance services to keep your deck looking its best for years to come. Protect your investment and extend the lifespan of your deck with our professional staining and sealing services.
process: Step 1: Deck Cleaning and Surface Preparation
Step 2: Application of High-Quality Stain or Sealant
Step 3: Multiple Coat Application for Maximum Protection
Step 4: Final Inspection and Quality Assurance
benefits: Protection from weather damage and wear
Enhanced aesthetic appeal of your deck
Extended lifespan of your deck
Prevention of mildew and wood rot

faq.question: How often should I stain or seal my deck?
faq.answer: We recommend staining or sealing your deck every 2-3 years, depending on the type of wood and the severity of the weather exposure.

faq.question: What type of stain or sealant should I use on my deck?
faq.answer: The best type of stain or sealant for your deck depends on the type of wood, your desired color, and the level of protection you need. We can help you choose the right product for your specific needs.

faq.question: How long does it take to stain or seal a deck?
faq.answer: The time it takes to stain or seal a deck depends on the size of the deck and the complexity of the job. We can provide you with an estimated timeline during the initial consultation.

services.name: Pergolas and Patios
services.shortDescription: Design and construction of custom pergolas and patios to enhance your outdoor living space.
services.description: Extend your outdoor living space with a custom-designed pergola or patio. We create beautiful and functional pergolas and patios that complement your home and landscape. Our experienced designers will work with you to create a design that meets your specific needs and preferences. We use high-quality materials and expert craftsmanship to ensure your pergola or patio is built to last. We can incorporate a variety of features, such as lighting, seating, and outdoor kitchens, to create a truly unique and inviting outdoor space. We handle all aspects of the construction process, from site preparation to final inspection, ensuring a seamless and stress-free experience for you. Whether you envision a cozy patio for relaxing or a grand pergola for entertaining, we have the expertise to make your dream a reality. We understand Tulsa's climate and build pergolas and patios that can withstand the elements. We obtain all necessary permits and ensure compliance with local building codes.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation and Site Assessment
Step 2: Design Development and Material Selection
Step 3: Construction and Installation
Step 4: Final Inspection and Project Completion
benefits: Enhanced outdoor living space
Increased property value
Custom design tailored to your needs
Protection from the elements

faq.question: What is the difference between a pergola and a patio?
faq.answer: A pergola is a freestanding structure with a lattice roof, while a patio is a paved outdoor area that is typically attached to the house.

faq.question: What materials do you use for pergolas and patios?
faq.answer: We use a variety of materials, including wood, composite, concrete, and stone. We can help you choose the material that best suits your needs and budget.

faq.question: Do I need a permit to build a pergola or patio?
faq.answer: Whether or not you need a permit to build a pergola or patio depends on the size and location of the structure. We can help you determine if a permit is required and assist with the application process.

services.name: Deck Lighting
services.shortDescription: Illuminate your outdoor space with our professional deck lighting installation services.
services.description: Enhance the ambiance and safety of your deck with our professional deck lighting installation services. We offer a wide range of lighting options, from subtle accent lighting to bright task lighting, to create the perfect atmosphere for your outdoor space. Our experienced electricians will install your lighting safely and efficiently, ensuring that it is properly wired and protected from the elements. We use high-quality, weather-resistant fixtures that are designed to withstand Tulsa's climate. We can also install smart lighting systems that allow you to control your deck lighting from your smartphone or tablet. Our deck lighting services not only enhance the beauty of your deck but also improve its safety and security. We can install lighting along walkways, stairs, and railings to prevent accidents. We can also install motion-activated security lighting to deter intruders. Our goal is to create a deck lighting system that is both beautiful and functional, providing you with years of enjoyment.
process: Step 1: Lighting Design Consultation
Step 2: Electrical Wiring and Fixture Installation
Step 3: System Programming and Testing
Step 4: Final Inspection and Customer Training
benefits: Enhanced ambiance and aesthetic appeal
Improved safety and security
Increased usability of your deck at night
Energy-efficient lighting options

faq.question: What types of deck lighting do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer a wide range of deck lighting options, including LED strip lighting, post cap lights, step lights, and spotlights.

faq.question: How much does deck lighting installation cost?
faq.answer: The cost of deck lighting installation varies depending on the size of the deck, the type of lighting, and the complexity of the installation. We offer free estimates to assess your needs and provide you with a detailed quote.

faq.question: Do you offer warranties on your deck lighting installation services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer warranties on our deck lighting installation services. The length of the warranty varies depending on the type of lighting and the scope of the project.

Fincannon Outdoor Living LLC is proud to provide expert deck building and outdoor living services to Tulsa, Oklahoma. We understand the unique character of Tulsa homes and landscapes, and we're committed to creating outdoor spaces that seamlessly blend with your property. Whether you envision a spacious deck for entertaining, a cozy pergola for relaxation, or a complete outdoor kitchen, our team has the experience and expertise to bring your vision to life.

We use only the highest-quality materials and construction techniques to ensure that your deck or outdoor living space is not only beautiful but also durable and long-lasting. From initial design to final construction, we'll work closely with you every step of the way to ensure your complete satisfaction. Trust Fincannon Outdoor Living LLC to transform your Tulsa backyard into an outdoor oasis you'll enjoy for years to come.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Fincannon Outdoor Living built our dream deck! We had a vision for a multi-level deck with a built-in fire pit, and they brought it to life perfectly. The craftsmanship is outstanding, and the team was professional and courteous throughout the entire process. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David B.
reviews.text: Our deck was in rough shape after years of neglect. Fincannon Outdoor Living repaired the damaged boards and reinforced the structure, making it safe and usable again. They were prompt, efficient, and the price was fair.

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: We hired Fincannon to stain and seal our deck, and we're thrilled with the results. The deck looks brand new, and the stain color is exactly what we wanted. The team was professional and paid attention to every detail.

reviews.name: Michael K.
reviews.text: Fincannon Outdoor Living designed and built a beautiful pergola for our backyard. It's the perfect spot for relaxing and entertaining. The team was creative and responsive to our needs. We couldn't be happier!

reviews.name: Amy S.
reviews.text: The deck lighting installed by Fincannon is amazing! It creates a warm and inviting atmosphere in our backyard. The team was professional and efficient, and the lights look fantastic. Great service!

reviews.name: Robert P.
reviews.text: From the initial consultation to the final design, Fincannon Outdoor Living exceeded our expectations. They listened to our ideas and created a deck design that is both functional and beautiful. They are true professionals!
